steps.t: Bâr Aroth can be found to the north of the Cross-roads in North Ithilien. Orcs have claimed the areas surrounding it as well. Thurindol has asked you …
Thurindol can be found at Aelin Veren to the north of Bâr Aroth. You have aided in reclaiming the southern ruins of North Ithilien. You should meet wi…
